name: doc-convert-tool
description: 简单、高效的在线文档格式转换工具集

scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend && node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const pkg = require('./package.json'); ['installer', 'portable'].forEach(dir => fs.mkdirSync('release/' + pkg.version + '/' + dir, { recursive: true }))" && electron-builder
scripts.build:backend: python -m pip install -r backend/requirements.txt && python -m pip install pyinstaller && python -m PyInstaller --noconfirm --clean --name backend-server --distpath backend/dist --workpath backend/build backend/main.py

author: 鲲穹AI
